title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Pro-24-POE Gen2
description: The second generation UniFi switches bring many changes and improvements, the switches have been redesigned from the ground up. Compared to the first generation, there is a significant improvement in airflow , which is used for cooling, making it up to 4x quieter* than the first generation. * at an ambient temperature of 25° and a 25% POE load, the switch is 3.6 times quieter * at an ambient temperature of 25° and a 50% POE load, the switch is 4.2 times quieter * at an ambient temperature of… USW-Pro-24-POE Gen2 has a total of 24 POE-Out ports. 1-16 ports support 802.3af/at standards, 17-24 ports support 802.3bt (60W) standards. The total POE budget is 400W (total power of 450W, 50W switch power consumption) The pair of 10G SFP + ports with 1G SFP backward compatibility will serve as the Uplink. In case of power failure, the switch can be connected to the UniFi SmartPower backup system, which can handle up to 6 supported devices The LCD touchscreen instantly shows the most important informations like error conditions, warnings, port statistics, connected device consumption, network usage, and more In the future firmware version, L3 switch functionality is planned Device Power cord Rackmount ears
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (24) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 24 PoE budget [W] 400 Max. power consumption [W] 50 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 285 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 88 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 65,48
